form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 8th of 14 at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 on March 26 over 1100m, 3 len behind Fuadee with 61kg at $18. Previously second-up came from midfield and won by a head at Hawkesbury Bm64 July 20 over 1100m defeating Honey Perfume with 59kg at $2.40. Is a second up winner in the past and should improve on the last effort.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track Bm64 on April 2 over 1000m, 0.7 len behind Zing To Me carrying 58.5kg at $7.50. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 11 at this track Bm64 on March 14 over 1100m, slow going neck behind Unreachable with 58kg at $10. Steps out over an extra 100m and must be considered.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 9 at Goulburn Bm58 on March 10 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Wandaye with 61kg at $3.40. The race before that was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 3.5 len at Canberra Mdn-Sw February 20 over 1000m defeating Show Rhythm carrying 58.5kg at $2.60. Deserves another chance.
